attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SM.DISTI_PRMTN_APPRVD_CUST_KEY AS DISTI_PRMTN_APPRVD_CUST_KEY, 
NDP.BK_PROMOTION_NUM AS BK_PROMOTION_NUM,
NDP. BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT  AS  BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT,
NDP. BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD  AS BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD,
ST.CUSTOMER_TYPE AS DISTI_PRMTN_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,
ST.CUSTOMER_NAME AS REPORTED_CUSTOMER_NAME,
ST.CUSTOMER_COUNTRY_CODE AS REPORTED_CUSTOMER_COUNTRY_CD,
ST.CUSTOMER_ADDRESS1 AS REPORTED_CUSTOMER_LINE_1_ADDR,
ST.CUSTOMER_ADDRESS2 AS  REPORTED_CUSTOMER_LINE_2_ADDR,
ST.CUSTOMER_CITY AS REPORTED_CUSTOMER_CITY_NAME,
ST.CUSTOMER_STATE AS  REPORTED_CUSTOMER_STATE_NAME,
ST.CUSTOMER_ZIP_CODE AS   REPORTED_CUSTOMER_ZIP_CD,
ST.CUSTOMER_PHONE AS REPORTED_CUSTOMER_PHONE_NUM,
ST.CUSTOMER_EMAIL_ADDRESS AS REPORTED_CUSTOMER_EMAIL_ADDR,
ST.PROMO_CUST_DETAIL_ID AS SK_PROMO_CUST_ID_INT,
ST.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NO AS  REPORTED_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUM,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS   EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS   EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM $$STGDB.ST_DCA_PROMO_CUSTOMER_DETAILS   ST
INNER JOIN
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTRIBUTOR_PROMOTION NDP
ON NDP.SK_PROMO_ID_INT = ST.PROMO_ID
INNER JOIN 
$$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_DISTI_PRMTN_APPRVD_CUSTOMER SM
ON SM.SK_PROMO_CUST_ID_INT=ST.PROMO_CUST_DETAIL_ID
WHERE ST.CUSTOMER_ID IS  NULL
OR NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP  
WHERE NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = ST.CUSTOMER_ID
AND ST.CUSTOMER_TYPE='ENDUSER'  AND NP.SS_CODE IN('CR','CR_MODS')
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_ORIGINATOR_ORG NPOS
WHERE NPOS.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT = ST.CUSTOMER_ID
AND CUSTOMER_TYPE='DISTI'
)
OR ST.CUSTOMER_TYPE='RESELLER'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DISTI_PRMTN_APPRVD_CUST_KEY ORDER BY ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1

Union 


SELECT
SM.DISTI_PRMTN_APPRVD_CUST_KEY AS DISTI_PRMTN_APPRVD_CUST_KEY, 
NDP.BK_PROMOTION_NUM AS BK_PROMOTION_NUM,
NDP. BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT  AS  BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT,
NDP. BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD  AS BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD,
EX.CUSTOMER_TYPE AS DISTI_PRMTN_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,
EX.CUSTOMER_NAME AS REPORTED_CUSTOMER_NAME,
EX.CUSTOMER_COUNTRY_CODE AS REPORTED_CUSTOMER_COUNTRY_CD,
EX.CUSTOMER_ADDRESS1 AS REPORTED_CUSTOMER_LINE_1_ADDR,
EX.CUSTOMER_ADDRESS2 AS  REPORTED_CUSTOMER_LINE_2_ADDR,
EX.CUSTOMER_CITY AS REPORTED_CUSTOMER_CITY_NAME,
EX.CUSTOMER_STATE AS  REPORTED_CUSTOMER_STATE_NAME,
EX.CUSTOMER_ZIP_CODE AS   REPORTED_CUSTOMER_ZIP_CD,
EX.CUSTOMER_PHONE AS REPORTED_CUSTOMER_PHONE_NUM,
EX.CUSTOMER_EMAIL_ADDRESS AS REPORTED_CUSTOMER_EMAIL_ADDR,
EX.PROMO_CUST_DETAIL_ID AS SK_PROMO_CUST_ID_INT,
EX.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NO AS  REPORTED_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUM,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS   EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS   EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_DISTI_PRMTN_APPRVD_CUSTOMER   EX
INNER JOIN
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTRIBUTOR_PROMOTION NDP
ON NDP.SK_PROMO_ID_INT = EX.PROMO_ID
INNER JOIN 
$$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_DISTI_PRMTN_APPRVD_CUSTOMER SM
ON SM.SK_PROMO_CUST_ID_INT=EX.PROMO_CUST_DETAIL_ID
WHERE EX.CUSTOMER_ID IS  NULL
OR NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP  
WHERE NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = EX.CUSTOMER_ID
AND EX.CUSTOMER_TYPE='ENDUSER'  AND NP.SS_CODE IN('CR','CR_MODS')
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_ORIGINATOR_ORG NPOS
WHERE NPOS.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT = EX.CUSTOMER_ID
AND CUSTOMER_TYPE='DISTI'
)
OR EX.CUSTOMER_TYPE='RESELLER'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DISTI_PRMTN_APPRVD_CUST_KEY ORDER BY ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1

SELECT ST.PROMO_ID, ST.PROMO_CUST_DETAIL_ID,
 ST.CUSTOMER_ID, ST.CUSTOMER_TYPE, 
 ST.CUSTOMER_NAME, ST.CUSTOMER_COUNTRY_CODE,
 ST.CUSTOMER_ADDRESS1, ST.CUSTOMER_ADDRESS2, 
 ST.CUSTOMER_CITY, ST.CUSTOMER_STATE, 
 ST.CUSTOMER_ZIP_CODE, ST.CUSTOMER_PHONE, 
 ST.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NO, ST.CUSTOMER_EMAIL_ADDRESS, 
 ST.ACTIVE_FLAG, ST.CREATED_BY,
 ST.CREATED_DATE, ST.UPDATED_BY,
 ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, ST.IT_COMMENTS, 
 ST.BATCH_ID, ST.ACTION_CD,
 ST.CREATE_DATETIME ,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_DCA_PROMO_CUSTOMER_DETAILS ST
WHERE 
(ST.CUSTOMER_ID IS  NULL
OR NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP  
WHERE NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT = ST.CUSTOMER_ID
AND ST.CUSTOMER_TYPE='ENDUSER'  AND NP.SS_CODE IN('CR','CR_MODS')
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_ORIGINATOR_ORG NPOS
WHERE NPOS.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT = ST.CUSTOMER_ID
AND CUSTOMER_TYPE='DISTI'
)
OR ST.CUSTOMER_TYPE='RESELLER')

AND 

(NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTRIBUTOR_PROMOTION NDP
WHERE NDP.SK_PROMO_ID_INT = ST.PROMO_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_DISTI_PRMTN_APPRVD_CUSTOMER SM
WHERE SM.SK_PROMO_CUST_ID_INT=ST.PROMO_CUST_DETAIL_ID))
